title: Cultivating Conditions
definition: The ability to consciously influence and shape the conditions within one's immediate environment, which in turn affects the larger system.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The ability to consciously influence and shape the conditions within one's immediate environment, which in turn affects the larger system.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The ability to consciously influence and shape the conditions within one's immediate environment, which in turn affects the larger system.
difficulty_levels.expert: The power to create positive or negative conditions through individual actions, making every action a moral choice.

extra_fields.insight: The power to create positive or negative conditions through individual actions, making every action a moral choice.
